title: bucranion capense
intro: Bucranion capense, also known as the horned poppy, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Papaveraceae family. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat various health issues, including insomnia, anxiety, and inflammation. The plant is rich in alkaloids, which have been found to have a sedative effect, making it a popular herbal remedy for promoting relaxation and reducing stress. Bucranion capense can be prepared as a tincture, tea, or capsule, and its health benefits also include its potential to reduce pain and improve sleep quality.
